messages.subject: [R--gR] Data extraction from lfstat recession function
messages.subject_clean: [R--gR] Data extraction from lfstat recession function
messages.body_plain:
Dear R-sig-gR users,

Does someone know how to extract point values form the regression
model of the recession function, package lfstat?
I would like to have the coefficient that appears on the graph, n
value, and be able to run anova.

Thanks in advance!

David
